untranslatable_reason: Broadening Bottom requires identification of specific peak/valley sequences (at least 2 minor highs and 2 minor lows in any order) which cannot be directly expressed as single-bar indicator comparisons. Pattern detection requires multi-bar lookback logic and local extrema identification that exceeds standard indicator conditions. Converted conditions provide approximation: price near range low (reversal zone), expanding bandwidth (widening volatility), and volume confirmation, but true pattern validation needs custom swing-point detection logic.
